name: Tayleea Cheecha (Romulan Beef & Fruit Stew)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a pan and brown the beef chunks all over.
2. Add the cider and reduce the heat until the contents of the pan are just simmering.
3. Add everything else except the cornstarch and water.
4. Simmer for about 2 hours, or until the meat is quite tender.
5. Mix the cornstarch in the water.
6. Add it to the meat mixture.
7. Cook for a few more minutes until the sauce is thickened.
8. Serve with either hot buttered rice or boiled potatoes with parsley and brown butter.
